message:
chore(beads): file 10 CONFORMANCE family beads + 5 [HIGH] divergence beads; close o4su + 6y8p

Opens: ds9o/pfo5/eud6/1b89/gz9f/ufar/qx7p/f3pv/rdeg/9r93 (lists, sets,
sorted sets, streams, hyperloglog, geo, pubsub, cluster, scripting,
persistence). Opens [HIGH]: 7rp6 (TTL accounting), t3xa (SETEX/PSETEX
wording), 68ql (LCS/SUBSTR/SETRANGE wording), a118 (HINCRBYFLOAT +
HRANDFIELD wording), zk9q (HGETALL order). Closes o4su (strings) and
6y8p (hash) — their live oracle tests landed in 6fe4321.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
